## Fork-divergence check (this is a frozen, pinned fork — see FORK.md)
- [ ] Deliberate local customization, **or** a backport of an upstream fix.
- [ ] No secrets / keys added to the repo.
- [ ] If this changes what runs at `:4000`, the `deployed-<date>` tag is updated.

## Verification (evidence, not assertion)
- [ ] Built / ran locally and confirmed the behavior.
- [ ] Remaining risks noted below.
